title: poa keysseri subsp. saruwagetica
intro: Poa keysseri subsp. saruwagetica is a subspecies of the Poa keysseri plant, specifically a type of grass native to the highlands of Ethiopia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional Ethiopian medicine, Poa keysseri subsp. saruwagetica is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or it can be made into a powder or tincture for oral consumption.
